items.title: Wendy's Offers 'A Job AI Can't Steal'— Could You Be Their $100K Chief Tasting Officer?
items.description: Fast-food chain Wendy's (NASDAQ: WEN) has launched a nationwide contest, promising a $100,000 package for the role of "Chief Tasting Officer". The contest, which started on March 2, will continue until March 30.

items.title: The Burger King President Who Took a Bite Out of McDonald’s
items.description: Tom Curtis has gone viral by recording a video of himself chomping on a Whopper and even posting his phone number online.
